{"is_ambiguous": false, "sql": "SELECT MedicalRoles.Salary  from Hospitals_Medical_Roles join MedicalRoles on Hospitals_Medical_Roles.RoleID = MedicalRoles.RoleID join Hospitals on Hospitals_Medical_Roles.HospitalID = Hospitals.HospitalID   GROUP BY Hospitals_Medical_Roles.RoleID HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Hospitals_Medical_Roles.HospitalID) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Hospitals)"}

{"is_ambiguous": true, "interpretations": ["SELECT Systems.system_name  from It_Support_Specialists_Systems join Systems on It_Support_Specialists_Systems.system_id = Systems.system_id join It_Support_Specialists on It_Support_Specialists_Systems.it_specialist_id = It_Support_Specialists.id   GROUP BY It_Support_Specialists_Systems.system_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT It_Support_Specialists_Systems.it_specialist_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  It_Support_Specialists)", "select it_support_specialists.name , systems.system_name from It_Support_Specialists_Systems join Systems on It_Support_Specialists_Systems.system_id = Systems.system_id join It_Support_Specialists on It_Support_Specialists_Systems.it_specialist_id = It_Support_Specialists.id"]}

{"is_ambiguous": false, "sql": "SELECT Responsibilities.responsibility  from Internships_Responsibilities join Responsibilities on Internships_Responsibilities.responsibilityId = Responsibilities.id join Internships on Internships_Responsibilities.internshipId = Internships.id   GROUP BY Internships_Responsibilities.responsibilityId HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Internships_Responsibilities.internshipId) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Internships)"}

{"is_ambiguous": false, "sql": "SELECT Minimum_Years, Preferred_Years
FROM Jobs
ORDER BY Salary DESC
LIMIT 1;"}
